backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profiles, content posting system with CRUD operations, access control with admin/user permissions, and search functionality with timestamp-based sorting.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting five implemented features for post creation: comprehensive error handling, loading state indicators, retry logic with exponential backoff, form validation, and automatic query invalidation after successful post creation.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files including components, pages, hooks, and configuration files for the MOD x RDX application with detailed descriptions of functionality and features.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles with OKLCH-based color system defining light and dark mode color tokens for UI components, using monochromatic palette with explicit image context menu rules.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with meta tags for Open Graph and Twitter Cards, canonical URL configuration for modxrdx.io domain, and base href for routing.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component setting up TanStack Router with five routes (home, create, about, contact, privacy), QueryClient provider for data fetching, and Toaster for notifications.
frontend/src/components/DeletePostDialog: AlertDialog component for confirming post deletion with loading state, displaying post title, and preventing action during submission.
frontend/src/components/EditPostDialog.t: Dialog component for editing posts with form fields for title, description, content type selection, content input, and optional image URL with validation and loading states.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with sticky header, navigation (desktop and mobile), logo, and authentication controls using Internet Identity. Includes routing links and handles login/logout with query cache clearing.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: Displays a single post as a card with title, description, content type badge, and content (text/link/image). Includes admin-only edit and delete buttons with dialog modals, copy-to-clipboard functionality, and error handling for images.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: Search input component with search icon and clear button that filters posts by title or description.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state. Initializes access control with admin token from URL params and invalidates dependent queries when actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCopyToClipboard.ts: Custom hook providing clipboard copy functionality with temporary success state that resets after 2 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout flow, identity state, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options and derivation origin support.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for CRUD operations on posts (get all, search, create, update, delete) and checking admin status. Includes retry logic, error handling with toast notifications, and automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark theme colors using OKLCH color space (purple/violet theme at 285° hue), plus base typography styles and image context menu enablement.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Displays the About page with mission statement, features list, and technology information about the MOD x RDX platform using Card components.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Renders the Contact page with clickable links to Instagram and Telegram social media accounts, styled with icons and hover effects.
frontend/src/pages/CreatePostPage.tsx: Provides a form for authenticated users to create posts with title, description, content type (text/link/image), and optional image URL. Includes profile setup dialog for first-time users and form validation.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main landing page displaying all posts with search functionality, logo/title header, and loading skeletons. Switches between showing all posts or filtered search results.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicyPage.tsx: Displays the Privacy Policy page with sections on data collection, usage, storage on Internet Computer blockchain, and third-party services using Card components.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence and cleanup capabilities.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system, container settings, custom spacing, animations, and plugins for typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Project state file tracking a minimal content-sharing website with 27 versions, featuring post management, Internet Identity authentication for developer-only access, and custom domain support. Contains architectural notes emphasizing static HTML/CSS/JS, responsive design, and a list of existing features including homepage, post creation, search, and static pages.
